Comments: Hi Denis I live in Colorado but have family in Gulfport Florida. I really appreciated your coverage during the last few weeks!!!
Any indication if these warnings are just radar indicated or a visual of a tornado on the ground?

maybe both. We had some here near Orlando during Helene. The clouds were favorite for a tornado any second. Sometimes it’s on the ground sometimes it’s close to being on the ground. Unfortunately take shelter and wait it out. I’m so sorry.

thanks I know that! Was checking on if a tornado was seen on the ground! Sorry for asking
